title: leucanthemum leucanthemum
intro: Leucanthemum leucanthemum, also known as the Oxford daisy, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Leucanthemum leucanthemum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Leucanthemum leucanthemum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
